'''vodasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabak|rabak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabak|rabak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vodasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodasithi|vodasithi]] || [[word:vodasiji|vodasiji]] || [[word:vodasishi|vodasishi]] || [[word:vodasiki|vodasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodasuthuthu|vodasuthuthu]] || [[word:vodasujuju|vodasujuju]] || [[word:vodasushushu|vodasushushu]] || [[word:vodasukuku|vodasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodasuthu|vodasuthu]] || [[word:vodasuju|vodasuju]] || [[word:vodasushu|vodasushu]] || [[word:vodasuku|vodasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodasufthuf|vodasufthuf]] || [[word:vodasufjuf|vodasufjuf]] || [[word:vodasufshuf|vodasufshuf]] || [[word:vodasufkuf|vodasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodasethe|vodasethe]] || [[word:vodaseje|vodaseje]] || [[word:vodaseshe|vodaseshe]] || [[word:vodaseke|vodaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodasothotho|vodasothotho]] || [[word:vodasojojo|vodasojojo]] || [[word:vodasoshosho|vodasoshosho]] || [[word:vodasokoko|vodasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodasotho|vodasotho]] || [[word:vodasojo|vodasojo]] || [[word:vodasosho|vodasosho]] || [[word:vodasoko|vodasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodasofthof|vodasofthof]] || [[word:vodasofjof|vodasofjof]] || [[word:vodasofshof|vodasofshof]] || [[word:vodasofkof|vodasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfthÃŸf|vodasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfjÃŸf|vodasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfshÃŸf|vodasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfkÃŸf|vodasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vodasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vodasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vodasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vodasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfthÃŸf|vodasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfjÃŸf|vodasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfshÃŸf|vodasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfkÃŸf|vodasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfthÃŸf|vodasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfjÃŸf|vodasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfshÃŸf|vodasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodasÃŸfkÃŸf|vodasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodasÃḊthÃḊ|vodasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vodasÃḊjÃḊ|vodasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vodasÃḊshÃḊ|vodasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vodasÃḊkÃḊ|vodasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodasathatha|vodasathatha]] || [[word:vodasajaja|vodasajaja]] || [[word:vodasashasha|vodasashasha]] || [[word:vodasakaka|vodasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodasatha|vodasatha]] || [[word:vodasaja|vodasaja]] || [[word:vodasasha|vodasasha]] || [[word:vodasaka|vodasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodasafthaf|vodasafthaf]] || [[word:vodasafjaf|vodasafjaf]] || [[word:vodasafshaf|vodasafshaf]] || [[word:vodasafkaf|vodasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vodasasha|vodasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodashÃḋsha|vodashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodasrosha|vodasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodasmusha|vodasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodasyasha|vodasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodasnkshÃḋsha|govodasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodasnkrosha|govodasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodasnkmusha|govodasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodasnkyasha|govodasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vodadasasha|vodadasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodadashÃḋsha|vodadashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodadasrosha|vodadasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodadasmusha|vodadasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodadasyasha|vodadasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodadasnkshÃḋsha|govodadasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodadasnkrosha|govodadasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodadasnkmusha|govodadasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodadasnkyasha|govodadasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vedÃḊsasha|vedÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vedÃḊshÃḋsha|vedÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vedÃḊsrosha|vedÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vedÃḊsmusha|vedÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vedÃḊsyasha|vedÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govedÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|govedÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govedÃḊsnkrosha|govedÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govedÃḊsnkmusha|govedÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govedÃḊsnkyasha|govedÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vodfasasha|vodfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodfashÃḋsha|vodfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodfasrosha|vodfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodfasmusha|vodfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodfasyasha|vodfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodfasnkshÃḋsha|govodfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodfasnkrosha|govodfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodfasnkmusha|govodfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodfasnkyasha|govodfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
